CustomField.formula:
CASE( BI_Data__r.opportunity_health_score_name__c, "Unhealthy", "🔴 Unhealthy", "Warning", "🟡 Warning", "Healthy", "🟢 Healthy", "" ) /* IF( BI_Data__r.opportunity_health_score_name__c = "Unhealthy", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFpH", "red" , 16, 50)&" "&"Unhealthy",
IF( BI_Data__r.opportunity_health_score_name__c = "Warning", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xWeC", "yellow", 16, 50 )&" "&"Warning" ,
IF( BI_Data__r.opportunity_health_score_name__c= "Healthy", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFo5", "green", 16, 50 )&" "&"Healthy",
NULL)) */
CustomField.label: Opportunity Score
